title: Tobias Agent Toolkit / Marketplace
description: Personal toolkit for systematizing AI-assisted development workflows and Spec-Driven Development. It organizes reusable skills, commands, rules, and documentation to improve technical analysis, validation, and change documentation.
descriptionEs: Toolkit personal para sistematizar workflows de desarrollo con IA y Spec-Driven Development. Organiza skills reutilizables, comandos, reglas y documentación para mejorar análisis técnico, validación y documentación de cambios.

title: REST API in Go
description: REST API built with a layered backend structure: handlers, services, repositories, models, and routes. Includes Docker, Makefile, Swagger, environment configuration, responsibility separation, and backend design principles.
descriptionEs: API REST desarrollada con estructura backend por capas: handlers, services, repositories, models y routes. Incluye Docker, Makefile, Swagger, configuración de entorno, separación de responsabilidades y principios de diseño backend.
